name: @ctrl/mcps
description: Source-of-truth for CTRL's bundled builtin mcps (ADR-024 v2 — currently builtin-irisy, merged from builtin-assist + builtin-create per ADR-002 amend 2026-05-30; user mcps install into ~/.ctrl/mcps/). Bundled into CTRL.app/Contents/Resources/mcps/builtin/ at build time; seeded into ~/.ctrl/mcps/ on every launch (shell/builtin_mcps.rs).

scripts.validate: echo 'mcp manifest validation lands when ctrl-mcp-sdk schema is finalized'
